unit.name: Gradient flow problems and LSTM architecture
unit.description: Derives vanishing/exploding gradients in vanilla RNNs and explains the LSTM fix at a high level.
unit.summary: Backpropagating through a vanilla RNN repeatedly multiplies by W_hh and the derivative of tanh [ts=3664s] [ts=3704s]. Since tanh’s derivative is at most 1 and usually below 1, it contributes to vanishing gradients [ts=3780s] [ts=3795s]. Even without the nonlinearity, repeated multiplication by W_hh can explode gradients when singular values are large or vanish them when singular values are small [ts=3814s] [ts=3839s]. Exploding gradients can be clipped, but vanishing gradients are a major reason long vanilla RNNs are hard to use [ts=3846s] [ts=3857s]. LSTMs address this by using input, forget, and output gates plus a cell-state pathway that makes it easier to pass information without repeatedly applying tanh [ts=3890s] [ts=3930s] [ts=3970s]. LSTMs do not guarantee a solution, but they make long-term dependency learning significantly easier and work well empirically [ts=4035s] [ts=4065s].

key_points.text: Vanilla RNN gradients repeatedly multiply by W_hh and tanh derivatives.
The derivative of tanh is at most 1 and often less, causing vanishing gradients.
Large singular values can explode gradients; small singular values can vanish them.
Gradient clipping mitigates exploding gradients but not the core vanishing-gradient problem.
LSTMs use gates and a cell-state path to selectively write, forget, output, and preserve information.

kp_catalog.name: Vanishing and exploding gradients
kp_catalog.description: Gradient-flow pathologies from repeated nonlinear and recurrent matrix multiplications.
kp_catalog.importance_rationale: Important because vanishing and exploding gradients formalizes how gradient-flow pathologies from repeated nonlinear and recurrent matrix multiplications, which later units use as core machinery rather than background context.

kp_catalog.name: LSTM gates and cell state
kp_catalog.description: Gated recurrent architecture that selectively writes, forgets, outputs, and preserves information.
kp_catalog.importance_rationale: Important because lSTM gates and cell state formalizes how gated recurrent architecture that selectively writes, forgets, outputs, and preserves information, which later units use as core machinery rather than background context.
